chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 1372 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 19.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Mohsin Mangi, APG ---------- Applicant and his counsel are called absent perhaps due to torrential rains in the city. As an indulgence, to come up on 26.08.2025. Late diary Before signing the order, counsel for the applicant appeared and places a Statement, which is taken on record, and submits that this bail application may be disposed of as withdrawn on account of the Order dated 19.07.2025 whereby the main case before learned trial Court has been disposed of and the applicant has been acquitted. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed as withdrawn. J U D G E Ashraf
